See the * [FAQ in the README](README.md#problems-with-invalid-numbers] on how to make * metadata changes. * * Do not modify this file directly! */ return [ 249153 => 'Khartoum', 249155 => 'Khartoum North', 249156 => 'Khartoum Rural', 249157 => 'Omdurman', 249183 => 'Khartoum', 249185 => 'Khartoum North', 249186 => 'Khartoum Rural', 249187 => 'Omdurman', ];
